ItacPersonItem.Notes: Signed the 1608 `Vincolo` document for the Umoristi. The author of: In morte di Girolamo Aleandro. Orazione... nell`Accademia degli Umoristi (Parigi, Cremoisy, 1636). Secretary of the Epistolae ad principes up to 1653 (Pastor). Censor among the Umoristi in 1638.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
